task_text: We need to finalize the welcome email to Meridian Group's IT lead. There's a draft in the sandbox — find it, review it, and improve it so it reads as more personalized and professional. Save the improved version back to the same file.

content.content:

client_onboarding_email_draft.txt
helios_api_endpoints.txt

To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Hi Priya,

We're excited to welcome Meridian Group to the Project Helios integration environment. Project Helios is NovaBridge's data integration platform—designed to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean data to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. Given Meridian's focus on reliable live-data pipelines and a smooth path to UAT, Helios should give your team the visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

To get started, we'll send your access credentials and onboarding documentation separately within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, a few next steps:

1. Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup (as discussed, target by 2026-07-12).
2. Your team will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.
3. We'll aim to resolve remaining setup items ahead of the stakeholder demo on 2026-07-25.

For technical questions, please reach out to Derek Okafor (Technical Lead) at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination and scheduling, contact Sarah Chen (Project Manager) at s.chen@novabridge.com. Either of us is happy to help.

Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions—we're looking forward to partnering with you and the Meridian team.

Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

input.content:
To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Dear Priya,

Welcome to the Project Helios integration environment! We are thrilled to partner with you and the Meridian Group IT team.

Project Helios is NovaBridge's premier data integration platform, designed to streamline data ingestion from your ERP system, apply robust transformation rules, and deliver clean, actionable data to your reporting platforms via secure APIs and webhooks. Knowing Meridian’s strong focus on reliable, live-data pipelines and a seamless transition to UAT, we are confident that Helios will provide your team with the visibility, control, and performance you require from day one.

To ensure a smooth onboarding process, you will receive your secure access credentials and comprehensive documentation in a separate email within the next 24 hours. 

In the meantime, here are our immediate next steps to keep us on track:
1. Provide Infrastructure Details: Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram so we can finalize the integration environment setup (target date: July 12, 2026).
2. Provision UAT Access: We look forward to your team provisioning access to the UAT environment (target date: July 19, 2026).
3. Finalize Setup: We will work closely with you to resolve any remaining setup items prior to our stakeholder demo on July 25, 2026.

Our team is fully committed to your success. Should you have any technical questions, please feel free to reach out to Derek Okafor, our Technical Lead, at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination, scheduling, or general inquiries, I will be your primary point of contact.

We look forward to a highly successful collaboration. Please do not hesitate to reach out if you need anything at all.

Warm regards,

Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

content.text:
I have located the email draft (`client_onboarding_email_draft.txt`), reviewed it, and updated it to sound more personalized and professional. I've then saved the improved version back to the same file. 

Here are the key improvements made to the draft:
1. **Warmer Greeting and Opening**: Changed to "Dear Priya," and added a more enthusiastic, direct welcome to both her and the Meridian Group IT team. 
2. **Elevated Tone**: Improved phrasing (e.g., using "premier data integration platform," "robust transformation rules," and "comprehensive documentation") to enhance professionalism.
3. **Clearer Next Steps**: Reformatted the bullet points into actionable, clear headers with spelled-out dates for better readability and a project-management focus.
4. **Enhanced Personalization**: Restructured the closing to emphasize NovaBridge's commitment to Meridian's success and better defined the specific roles of the contacts (Sarah and Derek) for clarity. 

The finalized draft is now ready for use in the sandbox! Let me know if you need any further adjustments.
